steps.title: Identify the relationship
steps.content: The first sentence makes a general claim: many mushroom species contain phenolic compounds, including cinnamic acid and catechin. The next sentence names specific mushroom species in which Costa detected those compounds.

steps.title: Choose an example signal
steps.content: A signals a cause, while B and C signal contrast. The relationship here is general statement followed by specific instances, so the transition should introduce examples. The answer is D.
